title: cymbopogon olivieri
intro: Cymbopogon olivieri, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a tropical grass native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Cymbopogon olivieri include reducing fever, relieving nausea, and lowering blood pressure. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be consumed or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
